grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Provides comprehensive 14-point numbered checklist with clear formatting and status tracking

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: References specific protocol stages (Stage A, B, C) and paragraph numbers throughout

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: All key items covered: searches (item 3), mortgage offer (item 4), deposit (item 5), insurance (item 6), signed contracts (item 7)

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly references Law Society Conveyancing Protocol 2019 with specific protocol references for each item
